DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -

DEFENDANTS JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS, CHASE HOME FINANCE LLC, CALIFORNIA RECOVEYANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797 (302/PHA)
